content.problemStatement: Two integers A and B are the inputs. Write a program to find GCD and LCM of A and B.
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, total number of testcases. Then follow T lines, each line contains an integer A and B.
content.outputFormat: Display the GCD and LCM of A and B separated by space respectively. The answer for each test case must be displayed in a new line.
